entries.final_answer: pandoc-latex: produce the printable PDF with pandoc and a XeLaTeX template. Chosen for print typography quality, accepting a TeX dependency in CI and two independent style systems (site CSS and LaTeX template) that must be kept from drifting.
entries.question: How should the printable PDF be produced: a print-typesetting engine (pandoc/LaTeX) or an HTML-to-PDF renderer that reuses the site's own stylesheet?
